title: glycosmis dinhensis
intro: Glycosmis dinhensis, also known as Vietnamese prickly ash, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, which includes citrus and related plants. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Glycosmis dinhensis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antiviral and antibacterial effects. In traditional Vietnamese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a powder or infusion, and also used in various herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and ointments.
